elements.perks: Co-living access, Community calls, Discord Access, Learning Hub, E-book: “HOW TO BUILD A REGENERATIVE VILLAGE”

elements.perks: Get 25% discount on stays by pre-paying every month

elements.description: BE THE LOOP. CONTINUOUSLY SUPPORT AND COME TO TDF

elements.title: Sheep
elements.description: Be the dream. make TDF one of your homes. get your $tdf and make sure to get your membersheep

elements.perks: Proof of Presence, Proof of Sweat, Instant Bookings, Flexible cancelation policy, Discount on stays & events
elements.title: Citizen

fundraiser.campaignTitle: Fund the completion of the dream

milestones.title: Buildings option exercise, architecture & engineering fees
milestones.description: Execute secured option to buy (asset expected to appraise at €1M).

milestones.title: Solar roofs, pool completion
milestones.description: Solar prices are raising. We have a special deal to buy panels at cost, and will stack functionality by turning our panels into an extra waterproofing layer over our roofs to avoid further rain dammage next year. Plus it includes €600+ energy income in the future as we establish a microgrid in Abela.

milestones.title: Industrial kitchen, 30 seat restaurant & 4 creative studios
milestones.description: This milestone completes our legal restaurant with 30 seat, a core business driver for our operation - alongside 4 studios with natural light and workspace for artists-in-residence and workshops. We expect some bank or grant co-financing for this step.

milestones.title: Co-living building
milestones.description: Complete the 12 en-suite rooms, dorms, and 3-bedroom house for full capacity as a licensed coliving destination. This is the community co-budget - for a €750k build that we aim to finance via bank or grants.

packages.title: First Step
packages.description: Start your regenerative journey with just 1 token.

packages.title: Supporter
packages.description: Support TDF and get meaningful access with 10 tokens.

packages.title: Aspiring Citizen
packages.description: Our most popular package - commit to 30 nights/year and unlock citizenship path.

packages.title: Private Lender
packages.description: Provide a loan directly to TDF with attractive terms and real estate security.

packages.title: Pre-book 1 month stay
packages.description: Pre-purchase 30 credits for a one-month stay.

general.platformLegalAddress: Cerca do Aviario, 7540-011, Abela, Santiago do Cacém, Portugal
general.expenseCategories: Legal & business, Land Infrastructure, Forestry, Tools & Machines, Maintenance, Operations, Energy, Factory, Miscellaneous, Lease, Equipment, Furniture, Water, Buildings Renovations, Shares, Experiment, Donations, Food, Salaries, Events, Stays, Internal op, Mushroom farm, Comms

elements.title: Participation
elements.description: We believe that transformative change, whether in the individual or in society, can occur only through the medium of deeply personal participation. We achieve being through doing. Everyone is invited to work. All participants are asked a very simple rule.

elements.title: Leave a positive trace
elements.description: We are a regenerative playground. So far we’ve planted over 3000 trees and shrubs, with 60+ species. Come and leave a mark that future generations will appreciate.

elements.title: Consent
elements.description: Bring awareness to your boundaries and needs and respect those of others. If it’s not a fuck yes it’s a no.

elements.title: Gifting
elements.description: What is your deepest gift that you can share?

elements.title: De-commodification
elements.description: In order to preserve the spirit of gifting, our community seeks to create social environments that are unmediated by commercial sponsorships, transactions, or advertising. We stand ready to protect our culture from such exploitation. We resist the substitution of consumption for participatory experience.

elements.title: Radical Self-reliance
elements.description: When you come to TDF, you are responsible for your own survival, safety, comfort, and well-being. There is food and drinks available for sale at the center camp, and you are also welcome to bring your own food - but please note that we do not provide a kitchen, and that bringing alcohol to the playground is not allowed.

elements.title: Communal Effort
elements.description: Our community values creative cooperation and collaboration. We strive to produce, promote and protect social networks, public spaces, works of art, and methods of communication that support such interaction.

elements.title: Civic Responsibility
elements.description: TDF is nested within the village of Abela. You are invited to meet our neighbours, and please be respectful and aware that their needs may be different to yours.

volunteering.skills: Electrician skills, Plumbing, Cement & plastering, Carpentry, Painting & decorating, Stoneworks, Tools & machinery operation, Design & drawing skills, Gardening, Hospitality, Kitchen and Cooking

elements.name: booking_requestRejected_guest
elements.description: Guest has request has been rejected, immediately send email to guest
elements.subject: Booking rejected
elements.title: 🚫 Your booking has been rejected
elements.text:
Your booking {{#if listing}}for {{listing.name}}{{/if}} was rejected by the Space Host!

Unfortunately, we regret to inform you that we are unable to accommodate your booking request at this time. We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused you.

Our team has carefully reviewed all of the information you provided, and we have taken into account several factors in making our decision. Due to scheduling conflicts, we are unable to fulfill your request.

We understand that this news may be disappointing, and we want to assure you that we value your business and would love to have the opportunity to work with you in the future if possible. If you have any further questions or would like to discuss alternative options, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Thank you again for considering us, and we hope to have the opportunity to serve you in the future.

elements.name: user_subscriptionCreated_user
elements.description: User subscribed, immediately send email to user
elements.subject: Welcome to {{PLATFORM_NAME}} - {{subscriptionPlan.title}}!
elements.title: 🕵🏽‍♀️ Your subscription is now active!
elements.text:
{{#if creditsToAward}}We just sent you {{creditsToAward}} accommodation credits 🥕

{{/if}}

Dear {{user.screenname}},

Your {{subscriptionPlan.title}} subscription is valid until {{nextBillingDate}}.

We are absolutely thrilled to welcome you to {{PLATFORM_NAME}}! Thank you for subscribing as a {{subscriptionPlan.title}} and joining our regenerative co-living community. We can't wait to embark on this exciting journey together. We believe in the power of collaboration, creativity, and nature. Our mission is to create a regenerative village where dreamers and doers like yourself can come together to build, play, and grow. We are dedicated to fostering a supportive and inclusive environment where everyone's unique skills and passions can thrive.

As a {{subscriptionPlan.title}}, you will have the opportunity to explore and contribute to our vibrant ecosystem. Here are a few things to get you started:

1. Join our community on Telegram - You will receive regular updates and news about TDF. This will keep you in the loop about upcoming events, initiatives, and opportunities to get involved.

2. Join our community on Discord - Here's where we can co-create on TDF related topics. If you wish to get involved, dive in here.

3. We invite you to join our monthly Community Calls, where you can connect with fellow Sheep (our affectionate term for community members) and learn more about TDF. These calls are a great way to ask questions, share experiences, and discover how you can support our mission. We host these once a month - stay tuned on Discord or Telegram!

4. Get your free copy of "How to build a regenerative village with code SHEEP

We are excited to have you as part of our community and look forward to creating magic together.

If you plan on a physical visit to the site and have any questions, you can reach our hosting team at {{PLATFORM_EMAIL}}.

Ate Ja!

elements.name: citizenship_application_guest
elements.description: User got approved for citizenship, immediately send email to user
elements.title: 🎉 Welcome, Citizen of the Dream Factory!
elements.text:
You did it. You are now an official Citizen of Traditional Dream Factory (TDF)—part of a growing movement reimagining how humans live, work, and regenerate together.

🌿 What this means

  • You can now instantly book nights of stay, and have better booking conditions
  • You are part of our Decentralized Autonomous Organization, the collective that steers TDF’s future.
  • You’ve joined a living experiment in regenerative living, blending soil care, culture, and cutting-edge tech.

✅ Next Steps

Join the Community

  • Join our community on Discord
  • Join on Telegram

Your citizenship isn’t just about a place to stay—it’s a stake in a living commons. Together we are building a multi-generational village rooted in soil, community, and creativity.

Welcome home.

Hi {{adminName}},

The monthly Stripe fees invoice for {{monthYear}} has been generated.

Summary:

  • Total Fees: {{totalFees}} {{currency}}
  • Stripe Fees: {{totalStripeFees}} {{currency}}
  • Connect Fees: {{totalConnectFees}} {{currency}}
  • Non transaction Stripe Fees: {{totalStripeFeeAmounts}} {{currency}}
  • Transaction Count: {{transactionCount}}

The simplified invoice PDF is attached to this email.

Please send this invoice to Toconline on Toconline expense tracking dashboard.

Date Range: {{dateRangeStart}} to {{dateRangeEnd}}
